data.description: RIVIAN CEO: EXPECTS DEMAND FOR ELECTRIC VANS TO KEEP RISING, WHILE NOTING AN INCREASE IN TRADE-INS OF GASOLINE OR LESS FUEL-EFFICIENT VEHICLES.

data.title: TLX101-Px (Pixlumi®) MAA Accepted in Europe
data.description: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited has recently disclosed the acceptance of the marketing authorization application for its glioma imaging product, TLX101-Px, in Europe. The application for O-(2-[18F]fluoroethyl)-L-tyrosine, known as 18F-FET, has been validated for review. Telix's stock is listed on ASX and NASDAQ under ticker symbol TLX.

data.title: Nelnet Business Services Acquires Passtab Safety and Compliance Platform
data.description: Nelnet Business Services, an arm of Nelnet, Inc. (NYSE: NNI), revealed its recent acquisition of Invision Digital Pty Ltd in Australia. The acquired company is behind brands like Passtab, Resitab, and Entrytab. Passtab, which specializes in managing school visitors, contractors, etc., is among the notable solutions added to Nelnet's portfolio. The acquisition demonstrates Nelnet's expansion strategies, marking a significant move in the education sector.

data.title: /UPDATE -- HardScope/
data.description: HardScope has officially launched the Market Bubble Prediction Market Podcast Series, hosted by Banks and Ansem. The news was released on 30-Apr-2026 by HardScope via PR Newswire. The podcast series is anticipated to attract a significant audience, with the company making adjustments to provide enhanced content. The hosts, Banks and Ansem, aim to deliver insightful discussions and forecasts in the finance sector. This initiative is expected to garner attention and engage listeners with valuable market insights.

data.title: Rosalind Franklin University Helix 51 Incubator Company BLR Bio Presents Promising New Scleroderma Drug Data at International Rheumatology Meeting
data.description: NORTH CHICAGO, Ill., April 30, 2026 - A breakthrough was made by BLR-200 in inhibiting the activation of scar-forming cells in systemic sclerosis models. Rosalind Franklin University of Medicine and Science revealed the unique mechanism at play. BLR Bio, housed in the university's Helix 51 incubator, was responsible for this discovery. This development marks a significant leap forward in the fight against systemic sclerosis, with potential implications for future treatments.

data.title: Spin Master Corp. Announces Election of Directors
data.description: Today, in Toronto on April 30, 2026, Spin Master Corp., a renowned global children's entertainment organization, revealed that the individuals outlined in its management information circular have been chosen as directors of the Company during its Annual Meeting of Shareholders conducted earlier in the day.

data.title: Windy City Wire Expands Hiring with Sales Class of 2026
data.description: A company based in Bolingbrook, Illinois, Windy City Wire, known for producing and distributing low-voltage wire and cable solutions, has revealed an increase in recruitment efforts for its Sales Class of 2026, with applications currently being accepted. The initiative, aimed at college graduates and early-career professionals, offers structured career development opportunities. Windy City Wire is actively assessing candidates and making offers continuously for the program.

data.title: QUAINT OAK BANCORP, INC. ANNOUNCES FIRST QUARTER EARNINGS
data.description: Today, on April 30, 2026, Quaint Oak Bancorp, Inc., the holding company for Quaint Oak Bank, revealed a notable financial update. The company reported a significant turnaround in their net income figures for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. They recorded a profit of $166,000, equivalent to $0.06 per basic and diluted share. This marks a stark improvement from the previous year, where they experienced a net loss of $83,000, or $(0.03) per basic and diluted share during the same period in 2025. The positive growth and financial success demonstrate a fruitful period for the company.

data.title: Primaris REIT Announces 2026 Annual General Meeting Voting Results
data.description: In Toronto, Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: PMZ.UN) disclosed that all trustee nominees listed in the Circular dated March 31, 2026, were successfully elected at the annual general meeting on April 30, 2026. The voting outcome for individual trustees showed that they received unanimous support, with the Number of Units Voted For representing 100% of the total units voted. This resulted in a clean sweep for Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust's trustee candidates.

data.title: Capstone Copper Announces 2026 Annual General Meeting Results
data.description: Capstone Copper Corp. shared the outcome of its 2026 Annual General Meeting (AGM) in Vancouver, British Columbia. The meeting, held on April 30, 2026, saw a significant turnout with 581,161,851 common shares voted, accounting for 76.10% of all outstanding common share votes. Shareholders unanimously approved all agenda items presented, including the election of a new board of directors. The positive voting results showcase strong shareholder confidence in the company's direction and leadership.

data.title: Badger's Commercial Execution Delivers 18% Revenue and 13% EBITDA Growth as Infrastructure End Markets Continue to Increase Demand
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 30, 2026, Badger Infrastructure Solutions Ltd. ("Badger" or the "Company") (TSX:BDGI) announced its first quarter financial results. The reported figures are in U.S. dollars unless specified otherwise.

data.title: WSI Named 2026 Responsible Care® Partner of the Year
data.description: A chemical third-party logistics company based in Appleton, Wisconsin, has recently received recognition for its commitment to safety and operational excellence. WSI (Warehouse Specialists, LLC) was named the Responsible Care® Partner of the Year by the American Chemistry Council (ACC) for the second year in a row. This acknowledges the company's dedication to upholding high standards in the industry. The accolade was given on April 30, 2026.

data.title: CH4 Natural Solutions Corporation Announces Pricing of Initial Public Offering
data.description: On April 30, 2026, CH4 Natural Solutions Corporation disclosed the pricing details of its initial public offering (IPO), consisting of 20,000,000 units sold at $10.00 per unit. These units are set to be traded on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE).

data.title: LG&E and KU collaborate with X-energy to explore nuclear energy
data.description: LG&E and KU have partnered with X-energy to investigate the possibility of introducing small nuclear reactors in the state of Kentucky. This collaboration aims to explore the feasibility and potential benefits of integrating nuclear energy into the existing infrastructure. By working together, the companies hope to assess the viability of this technology and its contribution to the energy sector. This initiative underscores the increasing interest in alternative energy sources and the importance of diversifying the power generation mix. It signifies a step towards innovative and sustainable solutions for meeting energy demands in the region.

data.title: Methanex Reports on Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Methanex Corporation (TSX:MX) (Nasdaq:MEOH) shared the outcomes of its Annual General Meeting in Vancouver, British Columbia, meeting Toronto Stock Exchange regulations.

data.title: TTEC Recognized as a Major Contender in Everest Group’s 2026 Healthcare CXM Intelligent Operations PEAK Matrix® Assessment
data.description: Recognition has been given to TTEC for its proficiency in providing AI-enhanced, results-focused customer experience solutions to healthcare entities. This acknowledgment underscores the company's capability in delivering advanced services tailored for the healthcare sector.
